revision.comment: use [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]], which needs no parameters
revision.text: {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

{{(Dis)establishments in year category header}}
[[Category:bump-01-18]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} [[:en:Category|Category]] [[:en:Category|Category]] {{draft categories| }} [[en:788 establishments]]
[[en:Category:788 establishments]] [[en:Category:788 establishments]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

[[en:Category:788 establishments]] [[en:Category:788 establishments]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

revision.comment: Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "[[:en:Category|Category]]" to ""
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8212573)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{(Dis)establishments in year category header}} {{wikidata link|Q8212573}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:788 establishments]] [[en:Category:788 establishments]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
